key_positions: Committed to becoming the first climate-neutral continent by 2050 via the European Green Deal.
Supports a comprehensive Carbon Border Adjustment Mechanism (CBAM) to prevent carbon leakage.
Advocates for a rapid phase-out of coal-fired power and ending fossil fuel subsidies globally.
red_lines: Will not accept any agreement that weakens existing environmental standards or protections.
Refuses to delay the implementation of the CBAM scheme despite pressure from trading partners.
